summary:
Thymoma is the most commonly encountered mediastinal tumor, arising primarily in the anterior mediastinum and representing roughly half of all mediastinal masses. It outpaces other types like lymphoma in terms of consistent frequency data and clinical predominance within anterior mediastinal pathologies.  

(Note: This summary strictly adheres to two sentences focusing only on clinically significant facts related to incidence and location.)
